titleStmt.title: SII 8.622: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 622. (A.R. No. 313 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . korājakesaripanma r tribhuvana ccakkaravattikaḷ
śrīku(ko)lottuṅkacoḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 6- Āvatu rāja
mahentra vaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu brahmade yam vṛtarāja payaṅkaraccaruppe
timaṅkalattu tiruccentuṟaiyuṭaiya mahāde var koyilil kāṇiyāḷār ci
va(p)brā(ā)hma ṇar mokiliyaṉ tattaikkaṉṟu Uyyavantāṉāna Aṟampayattabha ṭṭaṉu
m kāśya (ya)vaṉ tevaṉ periyāṉāna karuppūrnāṭṭubha ṭṭaṉum gauda vaṉ Īśvara- tevaṉu
n tiruvaiyāṟuuṭaiyāṉum kāśya (ya)vaṉ tiruttavattuṟaiyuṭaiyāṉ nāyakaṉum pāratā
yaṉ Eññamutti maṇṭaiyu muṉimokiṉiyaṉ cirāḷan Ayyaṉum Ivvaṉaivo
m Innāṭṭuk karuppūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvekampaṉ cokkaṉpakkal yāṇṭu nāṟ
pattāṟāvatu mīṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣa ttu ti
ṅkaḷkiḻamai peṟṟa cataiyattiṉāḷ Ivaṉiṭaiyilt tirucce
n tuṟaiuṭaiyamahāde var koyilil tiruvaṇukkaṉ tiruvācalukku
ḷḷe Oru tirunan=tā viḷakku Erikkakkaṭavomāka Ubh Aiyappaṭṭu Ittiruvekampaṉa
cokkaniṭaiyil Orukiḻippaṭa nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu kācu 4 Ikkācu nāluṅ kaik
koṇṭu Ikkācukkup palicaiyāka nicatam Uḻakku neyyāl Oru tirunattāviḷakku Iravupa
kal can=ti rā(t)tittaval Erikkakkaṭavo(m)mākavum Ikkoyilil Ucciyampo torucantikku
vanta Aṭiyāril Oru śrīhmāheśva rarkku Amutuceyya Orucaṭṭic coṟu Irunā
ḻi yariciyāl Amutuceyvikkakkaṭavomāka nāṅkaḷ Ittiruvekampaṉ cokka(n)niṭai
yil koṇṭa ḷa 45 (ni)-ḷa Innel nāṟpattaiṅkalamum koṇṭu Orāṭṭaināḷaikku
kalattukkut tūṇip patakku nel palicai polivatāka In
nellu nāṟpattaiṅ kalattukkup palicai polivanta
I 2 10 2- ḷapata Innel Irupattiru kalaney tūṇip patakkukkum
celavāka caṭṭi Oṉṟukku tiruccen=tu ṟaiuṭaiyāṉāl Arici Irunāḻikku ne
llu Aiññāḻiyum kaṟikkum Uppukkum nāḻiyum Āka nellu Aṟunāḻi cantra (r)ātittava
ṟ celuttakkaṭavomākavum . Innel palicai poliyumaḷakkum Iccaṭṭiccoṟu
Oṉṟu celuttukaikku Ippaṅkūṉimāsa mutal Āṟu māsattukku Ivanpakkal nāṅka
ḷ kaikkoṇṭa nellup patiṉoru kalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka I 5 10 6� Innel
Aimpattaṟu kalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum tiruccentu ṟai Uṭaiyāṉ marakkālāl Aḷavu
koṇṭu Iccaṭṭiccoṟu Oṉṟum Ippalicai nellukku celavāka cantrā(ā)- tittaval ce
luttakkaṭavomāka Ubhai yapaṭṭom Ivvaṉaivom [*] Ittirunantāviḷakku Erikkumaṭattum I
ccaṭṭiccoṟu celuttu maṭattu m Eṅkaḷpakkalum Eṅkaḷ vaṅkicattārpakkalum tāṉātamaṉavi
kkirakattāl peṟṟuṭaiyārum nāṅkaḷum Ivvanai vom Ubha yamcetu kaikoṭṭuRead kaikkoṇṭu.sam
matittukku(ṭ)ṭuttom civabraāhm(ā) ṇarom . Ivai Eṅkaḷ Eḻuttu . patmā heśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.622 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
